title: Tyz's Skills - Dark theme
description: Just a simple dark theme for Tyz's skills
body: ## Tyz's Skills - Dark Theme Just a simple dark theme for Tyz's skills gui **Supported mod versions : 4.x and 6.0.0 - 6.1.2 and 6.3+** ![1](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/5b8b46_61fe2714cf554481ab52967a3f539d74~mv2.png/v1/fill/w_600,h_338,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/2026-04-23_07_35_28.png) ![2](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/5b8b46_5e301e6bd07f42da802d09d81052f57e~mv2.png/v1/fill/w_600,h_338,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/2026-04-23_07_35_41.png)
